rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a footnote, grouped with Akbarpour and Li (2020), to support a general statement that many RTB markets have shifted to first-price auctions. The citing paper does not use Despotakis et al.'s model, assumptions, or results in its empirical strategy, mechanism tests, or core interpretation. Instead, it studies a second-price setting and uses the citation as contextual background about industry auction formats.
